picture.tex: \hbox to347.85pt{\vbox to116.81pt{\pgfpicture\makeatletter\hbox{\thinspace% \lower 0.0pt\hbox to0.0pt{\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\definecolor{% pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@rgb@stroke{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@color@rgb@fill{0}{0}{0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@setlinewidth{\the% \pgflinewidth}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\nullfont\hbox to0.0pt{\pgfsys@beginscope% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}{}{}{}{}% \definecolor[named]{pgffillcolor}{rgb}{0,0,0.5302734375}\pgfsys@color@rgb@fill% {0}{0}{0.5302734375}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ % }{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}% {{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}\pgfsys@moveto{0.0pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@lineto{0.0pt}{112.5% 3987pt}\pgfsys@curveto{0.0pt}{114.89699pt}{1.91077pt}{116.80775pt}{4.26788pt}{% 116.80775pt}\pgfsys@lineto{343.57756pt}{116.80775pt}\pgfsys@curveto{345.93468% pt}{116.80775pt}{347.84544pt}{114.89699pt}{347.84544pt}{112.53987pt}% \pgfsys@lineto{347.84544pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{347.84544pt}{1.91077pt}{% 345.93468pt}{0.0pt}{343.57756pt}{0.0pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{0.0pt}% \pgfsys@curveto{1.91077pt}{0.0pt}{0.0pt}{1.91077pt}{0.0pt}{4.26788pt}% \pgfsys@closepath\pgfsys@fill\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }{}{}{}{}{}{}{}{}% \definecolor[named]{pgffillcolor}{rgb}{0.92,0.92,1}\pgfsys@color@rgb@fill{0.92% }{0.92}{1}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}\pgfsys@invoke{ }{{}{}{{}}% }{{}{}{{}}}{}{}{{}{}{{}}}{{}{}{{}}}{}{}\pgfsys@moveto{1.42262pt}{4.26788pt}% \pgfsys@lineto{1.42262pt}{99.3831pt}\pgfsys@lineto{346.42282pt}{99.3831pt}% \pgfsys@lineto{346.42282pt}{4.26788pt}\pgfsys@curveto{346.42282pt}{2.69647pt}{% 345.14897pt}{1.42262pt}{343.57756pt}{1.42262pt}\pgfsys@lineto{4.26788pt}{1.422% 62pt}\pgfsys@curveto{2.69647pt}{1.42262pt}{1.42262pt}{2.69647pt}{1.42262pt}{4.% 26788pt}\pgfsys@closepath\pgfsys@fill\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke% { }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{105.59543pt}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{1,1,1}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\hbox{% \minipage[b]{316.5475pt}\color[rgb]{1,1,1}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{1,1,1}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{1}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{1}\ignorespaces% \centering\ignorespaces Semantic leakage in story generation\@add@centering% \endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@fill@opacity{1.0}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }{{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}{{}}\pgfsys@beginscope\pgfsys@invoke% { }\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{11.90286pt}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{% \minipage[b]{316.5475pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{% rgb}{0,0,0}\pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\ignorespaces% \ignorespaces Prompt: {\color[rgb]{0.70703125,0,0}\definecolor[named]{% pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0.70703125,0,0}{Tell me a short story about a child named% \lx@text@underline{Coral}.}} \\ Model: {\color[rgb]{0,0.51171875,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{% 0,0.51171875,0}{Sure, here is a short story about a child named Coral: In the % bustling \lx@text@underline{coastal} town of \lx@text@underline{Seaview}, and % the \lx@text@underline{waves} danced upon the \lx@text@underline{shore}, Coral% spent most of her days exploring the wonders of the \lx@text@underline{% seaside}. She grabbed her \lx@text@underline{seashell}-collecting basket and % marched down to the \lx@text@underline{beach}. Along the way, she encountered % friendly \lx@text@underline{crabs}, playful \lx@text@underline{dolphins}, % telling stories of the \lx@text@underline{ocean's} many secrets.}} \endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope{}{}{}\hss}\pgfsys@discardpath\pgfsys@invoke{% }\pgfsys@endscope\hss}}\endpgfpicture}}

inline-block.p: Prompt: Tell me a short story about a child named Coral.

Model: Sure, here is a short story about a child named Coral: In the bustling coastal town of Seaview, and the waves danced upon the shore, Coral spent most of her days exploring the wonders of the seaside. She grabbed her seashell-collecting basket and marched down to the beach. Along the way, she encountered friendly crabs, playful dolphins, telling stories of the ocean’s many secrets.

figure.toccaption: 1Example of story generation, exhibiting semantic leakage.
figure.caption: Figure 1Example of story generation, exhibiting semantic leakage.
